title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 9–12, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Huff.... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Huff... huff...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: knock knock!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: knock knock!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP- San!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I was worried that you wouldn't come back again.....

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kaya! Hurry! You have to escape!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Or else you will be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What's wrong?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You were lied by that Butler!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He's actually a pirate!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wait... wait a minute...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you talking about? How can clahador be a pirate?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It's true! I accident- Tally overheard...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: ...a con- version that guy had with his comrade

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That Butler came to work for you because of your wealth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He became your butler in order to obtain your family's wealth!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What are you talking about, USOPPP- San?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Tomorrow morning, he's going to let his pirate crew to attack our village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And then he's going to come and kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: If you don't leave now!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: It will be too late!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: USOPPP- San!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I was wrong about you!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey, what's that noise? Go check it out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Shit! Its that kid again!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I can't believe you are doing this to get your revenge on Claha- DOR...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I know he was a bit harsh on you...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Talking about your father that way... but...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: How can you make up lies about him like that?

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
